page_content:
BUSI - Part-Time MBA Program

BUSI600 Fundamentals of Business Decision Making (2 Credits) Introduces students to the language of business. Topics covered include financial accounting, financial management, data models, strategy, leadership and teamwork, and a brief action learning project on innovation.

Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program OR Permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business.

Additional Information: Pre-work includes the DISC assessment, and a requires a passing grade on a spreadsheet pre-work course.
